name: WidgeTDC Universal MCP Gateway
content:
"""
title: WidgeTDC Universal MCP Gateway
author: WidgeTDC Platform
version: 1.0.0
description: God Mode - call any of 449+ backend MCP tools dynamically
"""
import requests
import json
from datetime import datetime, timezone

class Tools:
    def __init__(self):
        self.base_url = "https://orchestrator-production-c27e.up.railway.app"
        self.headers = {"Authorization": "Bearer __ORCHESTRATOR_BEARER__", "Content-Type": "application/json"}

    def discover_mcp_tools(self, keyword: str = "") -> str:
        """
        List available MCP tools from the WidgeTDC backend (449+ tools).
        Optionally filter by keyword.
        :param keyword: Optional filter keyword (e.g. 'graph', 'audit', 'compliance')
        :return: List of available MCP tools
        """
        try:
            r = requests.get(f"{self.base_url}/tools/namespaces", headers=self.headers, timeout=10)
            data = r.json()
            tools = data.get("data", {}).get("tools", data.get("data", []))
            if keyword and isinstance(tools, list):
                tools = [t for t in tools if keyword.lower() in str(t).lower()]
            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
            if isinstance(tools, list):
                tool_list = '\n'.join(f'- `{t}`' if isinstance(t, str) else f'- `{t.get("name", t)}`' for t in tools[:50])
                return f"### Available MCP Tools ({len(tools)} found)\n\n{tool_list}\n\n---\n**Source:** tools/namespaces | {ts}"
            return f"### MCP Tools\n\n{json.dumps(tools, indent=2)[:2000]}\n\n---\n{ts}"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"Discovery Error: {e}"

    def execute_mcp_tool(self, tool_name: str, payload_json: str = "{}") -> str:
        """
        Execute any backend MCP tool by name. Use discover_mcp_tools first to find the right tool.
        :param tool_name: MCP tool name (e.g. 'graph.health', 'audit.dashboard', 'srag.query')
        :param payload_json: JSON string with tool arguments (default: empty object)
        :return: Tool execution result
        """
        try:
            payload = json.loads(payload_json) if isinstance(payload_json, str) else payload_json
            r = requests.post(f"{self.base_url}/api/tools/call_mcp_tool", headers=self.headers, json={"tool_name": tool_name, "payload": payload}, timeout=30)
            data = r.json().get("data", {})
            ts = datetime.now(timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
            result = data.get("result", json.dumps(data, indent=2))
            return f"### MCP Tool: {tool_name}\n\n{result}\n\n---\n**Duration:** {data.get('duration_ms', '?')}ms | {ts}"
        except Exception as e:
            return f"MCP Execution Error: {e}"

meta.description: God Mode: dynamically discover and call any of 449+ WidgeTDC backend MCP tools
